task_list.docs_info:
## aggregate_plate_histograms
Find all channel histograms in a plate and combine them.

In each image, a new table is created with the combined histograms.
The new table is named as the input histogram table with suffix "_plate".

task_list.name: BaSiC: Calculate and apply illumination correction for plate

zarr_urls.title: Zarr Urls
zarr_urls.description: List of paths or urls to the individual OME-Zarr images to be processed. (Standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

zarr_dir.title: Zarr Dir
zarr_dir.description: Profiles will be saved in {zarr_dir}/{illumination_profiles_folder_name} (Standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

illumination_profiles_folder_name.title: Illumination Profiles Folder Name
illumination_profiles_folder_name.description: Name of folder to save illumination profiles in. The folder will be created inside zarr_dir.

overwrite_illumination_profiles.title: Overwrite Illumination Profiles
overwrite_illumination_profiles.description: If True, overwrite existing illumination profiles of the same name. If False, an error is raised if illumination profiles already exist.

core_basic_parameters.title: Core Basic Parameters
core_basic_parameters.description: Core parameters for BaSiC illumination correction.

advanced_basic_parameters.title: Advanced Basic Parameters
advanced_basic_parameters.description: Advanced parameters for BaSiC illumination correction. See https://basicpy.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api.html

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Absolute path to the OME-Zarr image. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

init_args.title: Init Args
init_args.description: Initialization arguments from the init task.

task_list.docs_info:
## basic_correct_illumination_plate_init
Calculate illumination profiles for all channels in a plate using BaSiC.

See https://basicpy.readthedocs.io for more information on BaSiC.
This task calculates illumination correction profiles based on a random
sample of FOVs for each channel.
NOTE: This assumes that all FOVs in the plate have the same dimensions.

The calculated illumination profiles are saved in the specified folder,
and can be applied to images using the 'Basic: Apply illumination profile'
task.
## basic_apply_illumination_profile
Applies illumination correction to the OME-Zarr.

Uses illumination profiles calculated using the 'BaSiC: Calculate
illumination profile for plate' task.

bin_width.description: Width of the histogram bins. A bin-width of 1 is suitable for integer-valued images (e.g. 8-bit or 16-bit images).

task_list.name: Expand segmentation

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Path or url to the individual OME-Zarr image to be processed. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

input_ROI_table.title: Input Roi Table
input_ROI_table.description: Name of the ROI table over which the task loops to apply segmentation. Examples: `FOV_ROI_table` => loop over the field of views, `organoid_ROI_table` => loop over the organoid ROI table (generated by another task), `well_ROI_table` => process the whole well as one image.

input_label_name.title: Input Label Name
input_label_name.description: Name of the input label image to be expanded (e.g. `"nuclei"`).

expansion_distance.title: Expansion Distance
expansion_distance.description: Distance by which the labels are expanded, in pixels at level 0.

save_union.title: Save Union
save_union.description: If `True`, save the union of the original and expanded labels. (corresponds to e.g. the intire cell)

union_output_label_name.title: Union Output Label Name
union_output_label_name.description: Name of the output label image for the union (e.g. `cells`).

save_difference.title: Save Difference
save_difference.description: If `True`, save the difference between the original and expanded labels. (corresponds to e.g. the cytoplasm)

difference_output_label_name.title: Difference Output Label Name
difference_output_label_name.description: Name of the output label image for the difference (e.g. `cytoplasms`).

overwrite_existing_label.title: Overwrite Existing Label
overwrite_existing_label.description: If `True`, overwrite the created labels, if they already exist.

task_list.name: Measure features

ChannelInputModel.description: A channel which is specified by either `wavelength_id` or `label`.
ChannelInputModel.title: ChannelInputModel

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Path or url to the individual OME-Zarr image to be processed. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

input_label_name.title: Input Label Name
input_label_name.description: Name of the label that contains the seeds. Needs to exist in OME-Zarr file.

channels_to_include.title: Channels To Include
channels_to_include.description: List of channels to include for intensity and texture measurements. Use the channel label to indicate single channels. If None, all channels are included.

channels_to_exclude.title: Channels To Exclude
channels_to_exclude.description: List of channels to exclude for intensity and texture measurements. Use the channel label to indicate single channels. If None, no channels are excluded.

structure_props.title: Structure Props
structure_props.description: List of regionprops structure properties to measure.

intensity_props.title: Intensity Props
intensity_props.description: List of regionprops intensity properties to measure. ROI_table_name: Name of the ROI table to process.

pyramid_level.title: Pyramid Level
pyramid_level.description: Resolution level of the label image to calculate features on. Choose `0` for full resolution. Only tested for 2D images at level 0.

roi_table_name.title: Roi Table Name
roi_table_name.description: Name of the ROI table to iterate over.

append.title: Append
append.description: If True, append new measurements to existing table.

overwrite.title: Overwrite
overwrite.description: Only used if append is False. If True, overwrite existing table. If False, raise error if table already exists.

task_list.docs_info:
## measure_features
Calculate features based on label image and intensity image (optional).

Takes a label image and an optional intensity image and calculates
morphology, intensity and texture features in 2D. Writes results to a
feature table in the OME-Zarr file. If a feature table with the same name
already exists, the features will be added to the existing table.

task_list.docs_info:
## measure_parent_label
Assign label to parent label.

Takes a label image and a parent label image and assigns each label to a
parent label based on maximum overlap. Writes results to a feature table.

task_list.docs_info:
## measure_shortest_distance
Measure shortest distance of labels to target labels.

Takes a label image and a target label image and calculates the shortest
distance from each label to the nearest target label. Writes results to a
feature table.

task_list.name: Cellpose segmentation, simple

CustomNormalizer.description: Validator to handle different image normalization scenarios.
CustomNormalizer.title: CustomNormalizer

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Path or url to the individual OME-Zarr image to be processed. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

pyramid_level.title: Pyramid Level
pyramid_level.description: Pyramid level of the image to be segmented. Choose `0` to process at full resolution.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Channel for segmentation; requires either `wavelength_id` (e.g. `A01_C01`) or `label` (e.g. `DAPI`), but not both. Also contains normalization options: 'default': Data is normalized so 0.0=1st percentile and 1.0=99th percentile of image intensities. 'no_normalization': No normalization is applied. 'custom': You can either provide your own rescaling percentiles or fixed rescaling upper and lower bound integers. 'omero': The "start" and "end" values from the omero channels in the zarr file are used for upper and lower bounds. 'histogram': A precalculated histogram is used for normalization. Percentiles need to be provided.

input_ROI_table.title: Input Roi Table
input_ROI_table.description: Name of the ROI table over which the task loops to apply segmentation. Examples: `FOV_ROI_table` => loop over the field of views, `organoid_ROI_table` => loop over the organoid ROI table (generated by another task), `well_ROI_table` => process the whole well as one image.

output_ROI_table.title: Output Roi Table
output_ROI_table.description: If provided, a ROI table with that name is created, which will contain the bounding boxes of the newly segmented labels. ROI tables should have `ROI` in their name.

output_label_name.title: Output Label Name
output_label_name.description: Name of the output label image (e.g. `"organoids"`).

gpu.title: Gpu
gpu.description: If `True`, use the GPU for segmentation.

model_type.title: Model Type
model_type.description: Type of cellpose model to use for segmentation.

diameter.title: Diameter
diameter.description: Diameter of the objects to be segmented (pixels at level 0).

resample.title: Resample
resample.description: Run dynamics at original image size (will be slower but create more accurate boundaries).

overwrite_existing_label.title: Overwrite Existing Label
overwrite_existing_label.description: If `True`, overwrite the created labels, if they already exist.

task_list.docs_info:
## segment_cellpose_simple
Segment a single channel using cellpose.

task_list.name: Segment particles

CustomNormalizer.description: Validator to handle different image normalization scenarios.
CustomNormalizer.title: CustomNormalizer

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Path or url to the individual OME-Zarr image to be processed. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

pyramid_level.title: Pyramid Level
pyramid_level.description: Pyramid level of the image to be segmented. Choose `0` to process at full resolution.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Channel for segmentation; requires either `wavelength_id` (e.g. `A01_C01`) or `label` (e.g. `DAPI`), but not both. Also contains normalization options: 'default': Data is normalized so 0.0=1st percentile and 1.0=99th percentile of image intensities. 'no_normalization': No normalization is applied. 'custom': You can either provide your own rescaling percentiles or fixed rescaling upper and lower bound integers. 'omero': The "start" and "end" values from the omero channels in the zarr file are used for upper and lower bounds. 'histogram': A precalculated histogram is used for normalization. Percentiles need to be provided.

input_ROI_table.title: Input Roi Table
input_ROI_table.description: Name of the ROI table over which the task loops to apply segmentation. Examples: `FOV_ROI_table` => loop over the field of views, `organoid_ROI_table` => loop over the organoid ROI table (generated by another task), `well_ROI_table` => process the whole well as one image.

output_ROI_table.title: Output Roi Table
output_ROI_table.description: If provided, a ROI table with that name is created, which will contain the bounding boxes of the newly segmented labels. ROI tables should have `ROI` in their name.

output_label_name.title: Output Label Name
output_label_name.description: Name of the output label image (e.g. `"organoids"`).

gaussian_smoothing_sigma.title: Gaussian Smoothing Sigma
gaussian_smoothing_sigma.description: sigma for preprocessing gaussian filter (in pixels @ level0)

s2_param.title: S2 Param
s2_param.description: list of list of parameters for segmentation. The first element is the sigma for the laplacian of gaussian, and the second element is the threshold for the filtered image: [[sigma1, threshold1], [sigma2, threshold2], ...] e.g. [[1, 0.04], [1.5, 0.8], [2, 0.15], [4, 0.20]] (sigma in pixels @ chosen level)

fill_2d.title: Fill 2D
fill_2d.description: If True, holes will be filled

fill_max_size.title: Fill Max Size
fill_max_size.description: maximum hole-size to be filled (in pixels @ level0)

task_list.docs_info:
## segment_particles
Segment spot-like particles in 2D image.

Function inspired by the Allen Cell & Structure Segmenter. The steps are:
- Normalization (limits taken from OMERO-channel metadata)
- Gaussian smoothing (gaussian_smoothing_sigma)
- Laplacian of Gaussian filtering & thresholding at multiple scales (s2_param)
- Hole filling (fill_2d, fill_max_size)
- Seeded watershed segmentation, using the local maxima of the smoothed image
  (gaussian_smoothing_sigma) as seeds.

task_list.name: SMO background estimation

zarr_url.title: Zarr Url
zarr_url.description: Absolute path to the OME-Zarr image. (standard argument for Fractal tasks, managed by Fractal server).

sigma.title: Sigma
sigma.description: Standard deviation for Gaussian kernel of pre-filter.

size.title: Size
size.description: Averaging window size in pixels. Should be smaller than foreground objects.

subtract_background.title: Subtract Background
subtract_background.description: If True, subtract the estimated background from the image (clipping at zero).

overwrite_input_image.title: Overwrite Input Image
overwrite_input_image.description: If True, overwrite the input image. If False, create a new well sub-group to store the corrected image.

new_well_subgroup_suffix.title: New Well Subgroup Suffix
new_well_subgroup_suffix.description: Suffix to add to the new well sub-group name. Only used if overwrite_input_image is False.

task_list.docs_info:
## smo_background_estimation
Estimates background of each FOV using SMO.

Only works with 2D data at the moment.
